description:
You are acting as the configuration manager for a small service called “myapp”.  
An audit log that records every configuration event already exists at:

/home/user/config_audit.log

Your goal is to prepare a short report that contains ONLY the configuration “CHANGED” events and a final one-line summary that states how many change events occurred.

Required output file
--------------------
/home/user/changed_only.log   (must be created by you)

Exact format requirements for /home/user/changed_only.log
1. Copy every line from /home/user/config_audit.log that contains the literal text “| CHANGED |” (including the surrounding pipes and spaces) in the original order.  
2. After the last copied line, append a single summary line with this exact structure (no extra spaces or punctuation):

Total changes: N

where N is the number of “CHANGED” lines that you copied (a plain integer, no leading zeros).  
3. End the file with a single trailing newline character.

No additional lines, headers, blank lines, or commentary are allowed.

You only need a handful of shell commands (about three or four are enough) to:
• extract the required lines,  
• count them, and  
• write / append everything to /home/user/changed_only.log in the exact format.

When finished, you can cat the resulting /home/user/changed_only.log so that a human (and the automatic grader) can immediately see the final content.
truth:
Initial file that already exists before the agent starts:

Path: /home/user/config_audit.log  
Contents (exactly, with a trailing newline at the end of every line):

2023-07-01 12:00:00 | myapp.conf | ADDED   | enable_feature=true
2023-07-01 12:05:00 | myapp.conf | CHANGED | max_connections 100->150
2023-07-02 08:00:00 | myapp.conf | CHANGED | timeout 30->45
2023-07-03 09:30:00 | myapp.conf | REMOVED | debug_mode

Required file after the agent completes the task:

Path: /home/user/changed_only.log  
Expected contents (exactly, with one trailing newline after the last line):

2023-07-01 12:05:00 | myapp.conf | CHANGED | max_connections 100->150
2023-07-02 08:00:00 | myapp.conf | CHANGED | timeout 30->45
Total changes: 2

The /home/user/changed_only.log file must use default user-writable permissions (rw-r--r--) and reside directly in /home/user. No other files need to be modified or created.
